Composition.Programmer 1:
Implement backend code in app.py
- Fix the current issue where app.py contains CSS code instead of Python code.
- Develop the backend using Python and Flask.
- The website should be accessible via local port 5000, with the first page accessible at route '/' (Dashboard).
- Implement routing for all frontend pages, ensuring each route corresponds to the frontend code.
- Implement file read/write operations for all data files (jobs.txt, companies.txt, categories.txt, applications.txt, resumes.txt, job_categories.txt) starting from the first line, using plain text without encryption.
- Backend must provide data rendering and handling for all pages  dashboard.html, job_listings.html, job_details.html, application_form.html, application_tracking.html, companies.html, company_profile.html, resume_management.html, search_results.html.
- Support all features  browsing jobs, submitting resumes, tracking applications, viewing company profiles, managing job applications.
- Ensure no authentication is required; all features are directly accessible.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Develop frontend templates in the templates/ directory
- Complete all HTML templates for the nine pages with the specified page IDs and elements  dashboard.html, job_listings.html, job_details.html, application_form.html, application_tracking.html, companies.html, company_profile.html, resume_management.html, search_results.html.
- All URLs in the frontend code should be Flask routes, not direct HTML file names.
- Implement UI elements as per the requirements document, including buttons, inputs, dropdowns, tables, divs with specified IDs.
- Ensure the Dashboard page is the landing page.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure frontend templates correctly correspond to backend routes and data.
Composition.Programmer 3:
Develop static assets - CSS and JavaScript
- Move the current CSS code from app.py to css/styles.css in the static directory.
- Implement consistent styling across the application in css/styles.css.
- Implement client-side interactivity and dynamic behaviors in js/scripts.js, including search/filter functionality, navigation buttons, and UI responsiveness.
- Ensure integration with backend routes and frontend templates.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure UI elements and interactivity align with frontend templates.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of ALL pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
